productDisplayName: Timex Men Sliver Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a black bezel that has scalloped edges Dial style: Greyish white dial with black and white hands and hour markers Features: Has two chronograph faces, weekday indicator at the 11 hour mark, branding at the 12 hour mark Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Water resistant Warranty: 1 year
